The '''energy crystal''' was a power source used by the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] to power their [[energy collector core]] stationed on [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]] to power the nearby droid factories. During the [[Battle of Mygeeto]], a detachment of the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] led by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] extracted the crystal from the core.

The mission was, in truth, an operation guided by [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] known as "[[Hammertong/Legends|Hammertong]]." The crystal would later be used by engineers as the energy source for the superlaser of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]].
